common.title: Persona Studio
common.name: Name
common.footer: Persona Studio — Built for the EAFIT Challenge

auth.passwordHint: Choose a strong password with at least 8 characters
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Choose a secure new password for your account.
auth.verifyPendingSubtitle: We've sent a verification link to your email address.
auth.verifyPendingText: Since this is a simulated local setup, the verification link has also been printed directly to your server terminal logs.
auth.verifySuccess: Your account has been successfully verified! You can now access your dashboard.
auth.verifyLinkReady: Email service unavailable. Use the link below to verify your account:

validation.registerRequired: Email, name and password are required.
validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.emailNotVerified: Your email is not verified yet. Please click the verification link in your logs/email.
validation.invalidResetToken: The password reset link is invalid or has expired.
validation.resetTokenSuccess: Password updated successfully! You can now sign in.
validation.forgotSent: A password reset link has been sent to your email (and logged to the server logs).
validation.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent.
validation.botRequiredFields: Persona and service fields are required.
validation.botAtLeastOneMcp: Select at least one MCP server.

bots.title: My AI Bots
bots.subtitle: Create, edit, and publish in just a few clicks.
bots.empty: No bots yet. Start by creating your first assistant.

form.createSubtitle: Design a unique intelligent persona for the Verana Network.
form.editSubtitle: Refine your agent’s personality and update its capabilities.
form.intro: Follow these simple steps. You can keep it basic now and refine later.
form.step1Desc: Define the name, role, and appearance of your digital persona.
form.step2Desc: Select the tools and integrations your persona can access.
form.step3Desc: How will this agent appear in the public directory?
form.bioPlaceholder: A brief description of who they are and how they speak...
form.knowledgeHint: Paste URLs to give your agent context from your website.
form.aiPersonalityPlaceholder: You are a helpful, professional assistant. Talk like a friendly human...
form.aiPersonalityHint: Detailed instructions for the AI’s behavior and tone.
form.assistantNameHint: Example: Laura, Carlos, My Business Assistant.
form.professionHint: Example: Plumber, Tutor, Dentist, Legal Advisor.
form.serviceTitle: What should it help users with?
form.serviceNameHint: Example: Home Plumbing Booking, Math Tutor Assistant.
form.promptHint: Tip: Start with "Be friendly, clear, and practical. Ask follow-up questions when needed."
form.extrasSubtitle: Choose what your assistant can access.
form.knowledgeHintOriginal: Example: your FAQ page, public docs, service policies.
form.invalidFileType: Please select an image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP).
form.invalidFileSize: File too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
form.superpowersTooltip: Give your agent the ability to check the live weather, search Wikipedia, or read websites in real-time.
form.websiteContextTooltip: Paste links to your business website or FAQ page. The agent will read these pages to answer specific customer questions accurately.
form.aiPersonalityPlaceholderSimplified: Optional: Write custom instructions for your AI's personality. If left blank, we will automatically generate a custom personality based on your selected tone, name, and role!

bot.botsSubtitle: Create, edit, and publish your persona agents
bot.noBotsHint: Start by creating your first AI assistant

detail.subtitle: Manage this assistant and publish it for Hologram users.
detail.publishOutcome1: Your bot is deployed to Kubernetes in your team namespace.
detail.publishOutcome2: A public URL is created to connect from Hologram.
detail.publishOutcome3: You can unpublish at any time from this page.
detail.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. The agent and all its data will be permanently removed.
detail.deployingDesc: Packing up skills and launching to Verana Network. This usually takes 30-60 seconds.

memory.name: Persistent Memory
memory.description: Give the agent the ability to remember facts across conversations.

weather.name: Weather Forecast
weather.description: Look up real-time global weather conditions (Open-Meteo).

wikipedia.name: Wikipedia
wikipedia.description: Search and read Wikipedia to answer factual questions.

time.name: Time & Timezones
time.description: Provides local time and timezone conversion.

fetch.name: Web Fetcher
fetch.description: Allows the agent to read content from any public URL.
